name: Tahitian Tuna Cakes with Ginger Dressing And
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (6 oz each), drained and flaked tuna
recipeInstructions:
------------
SAUCE PREPARATION: Whisk together yogurt, lime juice, grated ginger, mustard, oil, and cumin in a small bowl. Set aside.
SALSA PREPARATION: Mix papaya, sweet red peppers, chopped cilantro, lime juice, honey, and ground red pepper in a small bowl. Set aside.
TUNA CAKE PREPARATION: In a large bowl, combine egg substitute, tuna, scallions, 2/3 of the bread crumbs, and 1/4 cup of the ginger sauce. Mix well. Shape into four 1/2-inch thick patties. Coat remaining bread crumbs over patties.
Heat a large non-stick frying pan over medium heat, warm oil. Add tuna patties and sauté for 3 minutes per side, or until golden brown. Transfer to individual plates. Drizzle with remaining ginger sauce. Serve with salsa and garnish with cilantro.
